Who We Are

Bakersfield's Home for Live Entertainment

Founded in 2015 in the heart of the Golden Empire, Temblor Brewing Company is a locally owned microbrewery, gastropub, and live entertainment venue — all under one roof.

We serve a full gastropub menu and host everything from intimate pub shows to major touring acts with the iconic Temblor hospitality Bakersfield loves.

Kitchen & Bar

Craft Beer & Great Food

A locally owned microbrewery and gastropub serving house-crafted beers alongside a full food menu. Sip the Streets of Bakersfield IPA while you watch your favorite band.

Craft Beer
Burgers & Sandwiches
Appetizers
Salads
Wine & Cocktails
NA Beer
View Food, Tap & Drink Menus Order Online with DoorDash
★ Happy Hour: Sun–Wed 2–6 PM · Thu 2–8 PM

Host Your Event

Private Events & Venue Rental

From corporate gatherings to birthday celebrations — Temblor offers a unique, memorable event experience.

Capacity

Up to 350 guests. Semi-private areas for smaller groups.

Venue Packages

Rental packages from $750–$1,250 for 50 guests. Full buyout available.

In-House Catering

Food packages from $15/person.

Full Bar Service

Craft beers on tap, wine, cocktails, and non-alcoholic options.

AV & Stage

Professional sound system, stage lighting, and AV equipment included.

Prime Location

3200 Buck Owens Blvd, Suite 200 · Bakersfield, CA 93308.

Work With Us

Join Our Team

We are looking for hard-working, beer-loving applicants that thrive in a fast-paced environment. If you want to join a family-like workplace with sweet beer benefits, come in to apply!

Front of House

Food Runners & Bartenders

Minimum Wage + Tips 15–25 hrs/week

Responsibilities

  • ✓Safely and efficiently deliver food to customers
  • ✓Follow up with all guests to ensure customer satisfaction
  • ✓Maintain a clean working area

Requirements

  • ✓2 years restaurant or customer service experience preferred but not required
  • ✓Self-motivated, hard-working, and thrives in a fast-paced environment
  • ✓Friendly, cheerful and willing to go beyond expectations for customer satisfaction
  • ✓Able to stand for up to 6 hours at a time
  • ✓Able to lift up to 55 lbs

Bartenders: A Cicerone Level I Certified Beer Server Certification is required.

Back of House

Kitchen Staff

Dish Washer Line Cook Prep Cook

Requirements

  • ✓Two years experience preferred
  • ✓Able to stand for up to 8 hours
  • ✓Able to lift 40 lbs
  • ✓Team player, fast learner and self-motivated

Sweet Perks

  • ★Family-like workplace culture
  • ★Beer benefits
  • ★Fast-paced, energetic environment
  • ★Live music & entertainment venue

Ready to Apply?

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. Applicants are considered for hire without regard to race, color, religion, creed, sex, marital status, national origin, age, or disability.
